creator: eric.douzet@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

After an installation by compilation of the packages.

Software that does not launch or start in Xfce 4.8 !


thunar-volman-0.3.80_3

xfburn-0.4.3


In previous versions of FreeBSD end Xfce, the directory /media is not
empty, but I dont have safeguard for inspect.

This might come from there ?

The problems are identical into FreeBSD-8.2-RELEASE and FreeBSD-7.4-RELEASE
with Xfce 4.8.

Best regards,

Éric Douzet
